title: ImmersiCraft
description: A Modpack focused on immersion and beautiful graphics while staying optimized.
body:
**Welcome to ImmersiCraft!**
**A pack designed to fully immerse you in a beautiful, dynamic, and optimized Minecraft world.**

---

**This modpack is built on three core pillars: stunning visuals, deep atmospheric immersion, and a smooth, stable gameplay experience.**

**A Living, Breathing World** - This pack is built from the ground up to be beautiful. It comes pre-configured with Iris and Sodium  as its foundation, allowing you to use shaders while benefiting from massive performance gains. The world itself has been completely reborn.

![MountainVillage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a68d3623569b61b1cef113d011c4852fea113dd.jpeg)


- Vast New Biomes: Explore countless new landscapes from Terralith , Biomes O' Plenty , and Oh The Biomes We've Gone.


- Overhauled Structures: Every vanilla structure has been redesigned by the full YUNG's suite (Better Dungeons, Strongholds, Mineshafts, etc.) , while new structures from Towns and Towers and Structory  fill the world.

- Dynamic Atmosphere: The world feels alive. Serene Seasons changes the world around you, while Presence Footsteps , AmbientSounds , and Sound Physics Remastered  create an incredibly realistic soundscape.


- Fluid Movement: Animations are overhauled with Player Animator and the Better Animations Collection. Plus, Immersive Portals  lets you travel between dimensions with no loading screens.

**New Adventures & Dimensions - A beautiful world is nothing without new adventures. ImmersiCraft adds new content to enhance your journey:**


- New Dimensions: Conquer the skies in The Aether (and its darker counterpart, Deep Aether ), or delve into the mysterious The Undergarden and the hostile realms of DivineRPG.


- Engaging Combat: Combat is faster and more tactical with Better Combat.


- Lost Treasures: Hunt for powerful new equipment with Artifacts or uncover the secrets of the past with Better Archeology.

**Optimized for Smooth Gameplay - All of this is made possible by a powerful suite of performance mods. In addition to Sodium, the pack includes Lithium , Ferrite Core , ModernFix , EntityCulling , and ImmediatelyFast  to ensure your framerate stays high and stable.**

======================================================

Wrapped in a complete set of quality-of-life mods like JEI , Waystones , Sophisticated Backpacks , and Xaero's Minimap, ImmersiCraft is the perfect pack for anyone who wants a stunning and immersive adventure that just works.
